# NetBox Security Copilot Instructions

Use `/AGENTS.md` as the repository source of truth for AI-assisted work.

Key expectations:

- Follow NetBox plugin conventions already used in `/netbox_security`.
- Keep changes small and scoped.
- Treat models, serializers, GraphQL types, filtersets, and tests as connected.
- Flag persisted choice-value changes as migration work.
- Prefer Black-formatted, NetBox-native code and existing repository patterns.

For a specialized project skill, use `/agent.md`.
